name: Cloak of the Bat
overview: A cloak that grants enhanced stealth, flight in darkness, and the ability to shapeshift into a bat.

properties.stealth_advantage: You have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks

flight.description: In an area of Dim Light or Darkness, you can grip the edges of the cloak and use it to gain a Fly Speed of 40 feet
flight.conditions: If you ever fail to grip the cloak's edges while flying in this way, or if you are no longer in Dim Light or Darkness, you lose this Fly Speed

polymorph.description: While wearing the cloak in an area of Dim Light or Darkness, you can cast Polymorph on yourself, shape-shifting into a Bat
polymorph.retained_scores: While in that form, you retain your Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores
polymorph.recharge: The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn
